---
title: Background information
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    number-sections: true
authors: "Marta Aransay, Carlota de la Concepción, Marta Rodrigo, Lucía Santos"<
date: 10/03/2026
---

# Protein 1

The **** protein has X ligand ...

# Protein 2

The *** protein has---

# Protein 3

We choose the *** protein
